rules: REQ-001: CLI argument --scenario N selects the hardcoded dataset.
REQ-002: turn = turn + 1 after every action attempt.
REQ-003: Combat is simultaneous mutual damage.
REQ-005: Win/Lose checks occur strictly post-action.
REQ-006: If both hero.hp <= 0 and all enemies.hp <= 0, status = DEFEAT.
REQ-007: Initial enemy count 0 results in FINISHED, not VICTORY.
REQ-008: Output is a single JSON line with: status, turn, hero_hp, hero_pos, enemies (id, hp, pos).
